# PooreYoutuber - Free Digital Creator Utilities & Web Testing Suite

An online suite of 33 free, professional, browser-based tools designed for digital content creators, video publishers, web developers, and document managers to test layouts, preview metadata, and format media assets. All utilities execute 100% client-side with zero backend data logging, ensuring absolute user privacy and cross-device display validation.

## Core Multi-Screen & Layout Preview Tools

- [Multi Live Browser](https://pooreyoutuber.github.io/multi-live.html): A specialized multi-window testing platform built for video broadcasters to preview and monitor live streams. Content publishers can verify local playback synchronization, check real-time layout constraints, and ensure live chat frames render correctly across multiple simulated viewport dimensions.
- [Multi Shorts Views](https://pooreyoutuber.github.io/youtube-short-preview.html): A responsive preview utility optimized for vertical layout constraints to test portrait video aspect ratios, cross-device rendering, and user-interface scaling.
- [Multi Browser](https://pooreyoutuber.github.io/multi-browser.html): A secure, browser-based layout configuration tool using official secure iframe embed technology. Designed for independent publishers to audit video player scaling, cross-browser responsiveness, and interface compatibility safely inside local instances.
- [Multi Browser 2.O](https://pooreyoutuber.github.io/multi-browser2.html): An advanced grid layout simulator offering granular state management and multi-instance playback visualization for responsive UI testing.
- [Multi View](https://pooreyoutuber.github.io/multi-view.html): A generalized responsive web viewport utility to test simultaneous layout responsiveness across standard desktop and mobile breakpoints.
- [FB Multi](https://pooreyoutuber.github.io/facebook-multi.html): A multi-window social feed simulator configured to verify social media video layouts, alignment, and aspect ratios.
- [TikTok Boost](https://pooreyoutuber.github.io/tiktok-multi-brower.html): A dedicated viewport testing simulator tailored for checking mobile UI alignment and portrait constraints on vertical media platforms.

## Media Content & Metadata Preview Utilities

- [YouTube Video Views](https://pooreyoutuber.github.io/youtube-view-checker.html): A local player deployment tool designed to evaluate aspect ratio rendering and video format presentation.
- [YouTube Thumbnail](https://pooreyoutuber.github.io/youtube-thumbnail.html): An asset preview tool to inspect thumbnail resolution, clarity, and visual aesthetics across standard dashboard dimensions.
- [YouTube Description Generator](https://pooreyoutuber.github.io/youtube-tool.html): A structural text utility that assists creators in organizing and formatting video description fields with clean metadata hierarchies.
- [Tags Generate](https://pooreyoutuber.github.io/Tags.html): A discovery tool for researching search text relevance and formatting descriptive metadata for media archiving.
- [YouTube Audit](https://pooreyoutuber.github.io/youtube-channel-audit.html): A profile layout inspector designed to evaluate channel branding coherence, banner rendering, and text placements.
- [YT-Sine](https://pooreyoutuber.github.io/youtube-sine.html): An audio-visual synchronization evaluation tool to check playback timing across media elements.
- [YT Keyword](https://pooreyoutuber.github.io/Yt-keyword.html): A search intent research utility to check contextual terms and topical relevance for instructional media content.

## Social Media Presentation & Formatting Tools

- [Insta Boost](https://pooreyoutuber.github.io/instagram.html): An aspect ratio validation tool designed for short-form mobile video publishers to inspect vertical grid boundaries.
- [Insta-Sine](https://pooreyoutuber.github.io/insta-sine.html): A multi-window sync checking helper for testing audio levels and timing benchmarks before distribution.
- [Instagram Ai caption](https://pooreyoutuber.github.io/insta-tool.html): A contextual text formatter that structures engaging captions and lists for complex, data-heavy niches.
- [TikTik-Seo](https://pooreyoutuber.github.io/TikTok-seo.html): A text formatting assistant built to structure search-friendly descriptions and sorting terms for media platforms.

## Responsive Ad Layout & Performance Validation Suite

- [Website Booster](https://pooreyoutuber.github.io/website-booster.html): A diagnostic web auditor designed to test script loading behaviors, client-side asset rendering, and responsive design stability.
- [Website ads1](https://pooreyoutuber.github.io/website-ads1.html): A layout environment to test responsive ad container behavior and placement alignment within content blocks.
- [Website ads3](https://pooreyoutuber.github.io/website-ads3.html): A dedicated cross-device placement preview utility to test how content shifts around responsive banner scripts.
- [Website ads4](https://pooreyoutuber.github.io/website-ads4.html): An ad container rendering validation board to inspect asynchronous script block execution and layout stability.
- [Website ads5](https://pooreyoutuber.github.io/website-ads5.html): A content stress-testing interface to measure rendering metrics and cumulative layout shift (CLS) under complex ad script conditions.

## File Formatting & Data Conversion Utilities

- [Anything Qr Code](https://pooreyoutuber.github.io/Anything-qr.html): A client-side QR generator running locally to encode custom plain-text strings or site URLs.
- [Image Resize](https://pooreyoutuber.github.io/image-resize.html): A web-based canvas utility to crop and modify graphic resolutions to fit platform banner guidelines.
- [Photo to PDF](https://pooreyoutuber.github.io/photo-to-pdf.html): A local document compiler that structures graphic assets into standard PDF layouts.
- [Video to Image](https://pooreyoutuber.github.io/video-to-image.html): A localized screen capture script to extract individual high-quality frames directly from local video files.
- [Image To Ms Word](https://pooreyoutuber.github.io/ms-word.html): A client-side layout parser that assists in converting text-based graphics into basic document formatting.
- [Text To Handwriting](https://pooreyoutuber.github.io/handwriting.html): A stylized typography render engine that converts typed scripts into handwriting layout previews.
- [PDF Compress online](https://pooreyoutuber.github.io/pdf-compress.html): A localized document optimization script designed to compress binary data lengths of PDF packages.
- [Emi Check online](https://pooreyoutuber.github.io/emi.html): A functional mathematics-based computing form used to determine standard credit amortization schedule timelines.
- [mp3](https://pooreyoutuber.github.io/mp3.html): An in-browser container manager to verify audio compression, codecs, and file parameters.
- [mp4](https://pooreyoutuber.github.io/mp4.html): A local video container tester to preview file format properties, resolutions, and cross-browser codec support.

## Privacy & Security Compliance

- **No Server Storage:** No user files, images, documents, or video URLs are uploaded to external servers. All operations are sandboxed locally.
- **Client-Side Execution:** Code compilation, data conversion, and iframe rendering happen entirely within the user's local web browser environment.
- **No Identity Tracking:** The platform requires no user registration, sign-ups, email inputs, or account creations.
- **Zero Third-Party Data Sharing:** As no user logs or databases are maintained on the backend, zero metadata is tracked, compiled, or monetized.
